/usr/bin/g++-11 -fPIC -O3 -shared -Wl,-soname,libmv-basic-pnp.so -o libmv-basic-pnp.so CMakeFiles/mv-basic-pnp.dir/angle_solve/basic_pnp.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/prototype152/EX_MiracleVision/3rdparty/foxglove/lib:/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.5 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.5.5 -Wl,--as-needed
